features.description: A list of features that are enabled for the GuardDuty detector, each with its name, status, and any additional configuration.

finding_publishing_frequency.description: The frequency at which findings are published by the GuardDuty detector, e.g., every 15 minutes, 1 hour, or 6 hours.

id.description: The unique identifier of the GuardDuty detector.

service_role_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role that allows GuardDuty to access AWS resources.

status.description: The current status of the GuardDuty detector, indicating whether it is enabled or disabled.
